title: Notification No.72/2009-Cus(NT),dated 30.6.2009
text: [To be published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii)] Government of India Ministry of Finance (Department of Revenue) Notification No. 72 / 2009-Customs (N.T.) New Delhi, dated the 30 June, 2009. 9 Asadha, 1931 Saka. S.O. (E). – In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 and sub- section (1) of section 5 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints the Commissioner of Customs (Adjudication), Delhi to act as a common adjudicating authority to exercise the powers and discharge the duties conferred or imposed on:- 1. the Commissioner of Customs (Import), Air Cargo, New Delhi; and 2. the Commissioner of Customs, Inland Container Depot, Tughlakabad, New Delhi for the purpose of adjudicating the matters relating to Show Cause Notice pertaining to M/s Disha Overseas Private Limited, M-5, Mahaveer Bhawan, Karampura Commercial Complex, New Delhi - 110015 and other issued vide, DRI F.No. 50D/113/206, dated the 28th March, 2009, by the Additional Director General, Directorate of Revenue Intelligence, D-Blolck, I.P.Bhawan, I.P.Estate, New Delhi [F.No. 437/26/2009-Cus.IV (M.M.Parthiban) Director (Customs) to the Government of India -- 1 of 1 --
